About
ICICI Prudential BHARAT 22 FOF Direct Growth
ICICI Prudential BHARAT 22 FOF Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 12 Oct 1993. Venus Ahuja is the Current Fund Manager of ICICI Prudential BHARAT 22 FOF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹11,18,142 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 06 Jul 2026 is ₹34.71.
The ICICI Prudential BHARAT 22 FOF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹1,000. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹5,000.
;
Investment Objective
The scheme seeks to generate returns by investing in units of BHARAT 22 ETF.

BSE Bharat 22 Total Return Index
